tluaNoTypeAccessors.tlua(4,3): error TLUA7008: Member 'get' implicitly has an 'any' type.
tluaNoTypeAccessors.tlua(4,7): error TLUA1005: ';' expected.
tluaNoTypeAccessors.tlua(5,3): error TLUA7008: Member 'set' implicitly has an 'any' type.
tluaNoTypeAccessors.tlua(5,7): error TLUA1005: ';' expected.
tluaNoTypeAccessors.tlua(5,7): error TLUA7010: 'value', which lacks return-type annotation, implicitly has an 'any' return type.


==== tluaNoTypeAccessors.tlua (5 errors) ====
    // Type accessors are removed. `get` and `set` are recovered as ordinary
    // member names rather than accessor declarations.
    interface Accessors {
      get value(): string;
      ~~~
!!! error TLUA7008: Member 'get' implicitly has an 'any' type.
          ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1005: ';' expected.
      set value(next: string);
      ~~~
!!! error TLUA7008: Member 'set' implicitly has an 'any' type.
          ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1005: ';' expected.
          ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA7010: 'value', which lacks return-type annotation, implicitly has an 'any' return type.
    }
